name: Explicit paper with blocked live evidence fails closed
paper_text:
# Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Models

arXiv: 2006.11239
DOI: 10.48550/arXiv.2006.11239
Code: https://github.com/hojonathanho/diffusion
Data: CIFAR-10, LSUN, CelebA-HQ

The paper evaluates a diffusion-based generative modeling approach against image generation benchmarks. It claims denoising diffusion models produce high quality samples. It reports likelihood estimates and ablation results. It depends on public image datasets and an implementation repository for reproduction.

required_gaps: paper identity not verified by arXiv or DOI
dataset resolver found no public dataset record

name: Unsupported claims produce missing-evidence report
paper_text:
# Private Benchmark Agent Study

The method claims state-of-the-art reproducibility prediction accuracy on a private benchmark.
The data section describes an internal dataset with no public URL or accession.
The code section says source code may be released later but gives no repository.
The results section reports a 27 percent improvement over prior systems.

name: Low autonomy gates network and code/data tool classes
paper_text:
# CLIP-Style Multimodal Reproduction Note

arXiv: 2103.00020
DOI: 10.48550/arXiv.2103.00020
Code: https://github.com/openai/CLIP
Data: WIT, ImageNet, Flickr30k

The paper claims transferable zero-shot performance using a contrastive language-image method. It reports benchmark results across multiple datasets. It depends on a source repository and dataset provenance for reproduction. It should not execute code unless the autonomy policy allows sandboxed planning.
